---
name: Art contribution
about: Offer to replace AI-generated art or request an asset
title: '[Art] '
labels: art
assignees: ''
---

**Asset type**
- [ ] Card portrait
- [ ] Power icon
- [ ] Relic icon
- [ ] Character UI / select screen
- [ ] Other:

**Asset name / path**
e.g. `Struggler/images/card_portraits/dragonslayer.png`

**Contribution or request?**
- [ ] I am submitting / planning to submit art (PR link if open)
- [ ] I am requesting community art for this asset

**License / source**
- [ ] My original work (will license under MIT with the repo)
- [ ] AI-assisted (tool name):
- [ ] Other (explain):

**Preview**
Attach a screenshot or link if available.

**Notes**
Dimensions, style direction, or references.
